ShopNest QA Automation — File Upload Test Data
================================================
This file is used as a fixture for the FileUploadTest suite.
It validates that the upload mechanism on the-internet.herokuapp.com
correctly receives, processes, and confirms a file upload.

Framework: Selenium WebDriver + TestNG + Java 17
Author: Sachin — QA Automation Engineer
Assignment: ShopNest Checkout 2.0 — UI Automation
